narration_optional: Open benchmark. Open repo. Real forensic workflow.

outro_modifiers.narrative_center: pure closure + credibility — no new story, no investigation energy
outro_modifiers.motion_discipline: single composition, layered reveal, no beat crossfades, no card shuffles
outro_modifiers.amber_discipline: ACCENT used only on (a) hairline under brand, (b) underline beneath tagline, (c) final beat-dot; MUTED_AMBER for repo/benchmark label eyebrows
outro_modifiers.grid_alpha: backdrop grid at 0.55 of prior blocks to feel quieter
outro_modifiers.locked_final_frame: last 1.0s is motionless; beat-dot indicator fades out at t=8.5s to signal end-of-film
outro_modifiers.vignette: subtle top/bottom ambient vignette added to reinforce final-card feel
outro_modifiers.no_beat_crossfades: single scene, so no inter-beat crossfades

beats.name: brand fade-in

beats.name: repo + benchmark

beats.name: core tagline
beats.content: 'real forensic workflow' at 56pt + ACCENT underline + 'open benchmark · open repo · grounded in real bags' subtitle

beats.name: locked final hold
